SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers

Class GameArtProvider

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers.GameArtProvider
public final class GameArtProvider extends Object
Looks up cached or remote game art for loaded ROMs.

The provider prefers libretro box art and falls back to title screens or gameplay snaps when cover art is unavailable.

    GameArtProvider.GameArtResult
    Encapsulates fetched game art and its source label.

    Description
    static Optional<GameArtProvider.GameArtResult>
    FindGameArt(ROM rom)
    Resolves game art for the supplied ROM, using a local cache when present.

    Resolves game art for the supplied ROM using an optional explicit art mode.

  • Method Details

    • FindGameArt

      public static Optional<GameArtProvider.GameArtResult> FindGameArt(ROM rom)
      Resolves game art for the supplied ROM, using a local cache when present.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      Returns:
      fetched art if a source matched

    • FindGameArt

      public static Optional<GameArtProvider.GameArtResult> FindGameArt(GameArtProvider.GameArtDescriptor descriptor)
      Resolves game art for the supplied game descriptor, using a local cache when present.
      Parameters:
      descriptor - tracked game descriptor
      Returns:
      fetched art if a source matched

    • FindGameArt

      public static Optional<GameArtProvider.GameArtResult> FindGameArt(ROM rom, GameArtDisplayMode displayMode)
      Resolves game art for the supplied ROM using an optional explicit art mode.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      displayMode - requested art mode, or null for provider default order
      Returns:
      fetched art if a source matched

    • FindGameArt

      public static Optional<GameArtProvider.GameArtResult> FindGameArt(GameArtProvider.GameArtDescriptor descriptor, GameArtDisplayMode displayMode)
      Resolves game art for the supplied game descriptor, using a local cache when present.
      Parameters:
      descriptor - tracked game descriptor
      displayMode - requested art mode, or null for provider default order
      Returns:
      fetched art if a source matched
